mapper.select: SELECT * FROM song ORDER BY artist, album, title
SELECT * FROM song WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR artist LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR album LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY artist, album, title
SELECT * FROM song WHERE artist = #{artist} ORDER BY album, title
SELECT * FROM song WHERE album = #{album} ORDER BY title
SELECT DISTINCT artist FROM song WHERE artist IS NOT NULL ORDER BY artist
SELECT DISTINCT album FROM song WHERE album IS NOT NULL ORDER BY album
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO song (title, artist, album, file_path, cover_path, duration, file_size, file_type, artist_group, album_group) VALUES (#{title}, #{artist}, #{album}, #{filePath}, #{coverPath}, #{duration}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{artistGroup}, #{albumGroup})
mapper.update: UPDATE song SET title = #{title}, artist = #{artist}, album = #{album}, file_path = #{filePath}, cover_path = #{coverPath}, duration = #{duration}, file_size = #{fileSize}, file_type = #{fileType}, artist_group = #{artistGroup}, album_group = #{albumGroup} WHERE id = #{id}
